name: signature-generator
description: Clasp-based Google Apps Script scaffold for generating corporate email signatures.

scripts.sync: npm run build --if-present && npm run push && npm run ide
scripts.preview: npm run build --if-present && npm run push && clasp deploy -i AKfycbyX5tJyIZCzEInVpBUzJ5os6WQ0NxgDrD-6D1qFEx3Y && npm run web
